mapper.sql: Id, title, nicktitle, password, scriptcode, created, updated, url, type, logo, description, usecount, version, img, price, original_price, valid, forh5, privatetag, lifeperiod
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_commands
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_commands (Id, title, nicktitle, password, scriptcode, created, updated, url, type, logo, description, usecount, version, img, price, original_price, valid, forh5, privatetag, lifeperiod) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nicktitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{usecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{valid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{forh5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{privatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lifeperiod,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into tb_commands
Id,
title,
nicktitle,
password,
scriptcode,
created,
updated,
url,
type,
logo,
description,
usecount,
version,
img,
price,
original_price,
valid,
forh5,
privatetag,
lifeperiod,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nicktitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{usecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{valid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{forh5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{privatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lifeperiod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update tb_commands
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nicktitle = #{record.nicktitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scriptcode = #{record.scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
url = #{record.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
logo = #{record.logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
usecount = #{record.usecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img = #{record.img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
original_price = #{record.originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
valid = #{record.valid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
forh5 = #{record.forh5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
privatetag = #{record.privatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lifeperiod = #{record.lifeperiod,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update tb_commands set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nicktitle = #{record.nicktitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scriptcode = #{record.scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, url = #{record.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, logo = #{record.logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, usecount = #{record.usecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, img = #{record.img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, original_price = #{record.originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, valid = #{record.valid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, forh5 = #{record.forh5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, privatetag = #{record.privatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lifeperiod = #{record.lifeperiod,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_commands
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nicktitle = #{nicktitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scriptcode = #{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
logo = #{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
usecount = #{usecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
original_price = #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
valid = #{valid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
forh5 = #{forh5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
privatetag = #{privatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lifeperiod = #{lifeperiod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_commands set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nicktitle = #{nicktitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scriptcode = #{scriptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, logo = #{logo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, usecount = #{usecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, original_price = #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, valid = #{valid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, forh5 = #{forh5,jdbcType=INTEGER}, privatetag = #{privatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lifeperiod = #{lifeperiod,jdbcType=INTEGER} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
